# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Key Vault SKU."
      }
    },
    "enabledForDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForTemplateDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForDiskEncryption": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90,
      "minValue": 7,
      "maxValue": 90
    },
    "publicNetworkAccess": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Enabled",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Enabled",
        "Disabled"
      ]
    },
    "useRbacAuthorization": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "If true, uses Azure RBAC authorization model and ignores accessPolicies."
      }
    },
    "objectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of Azure AD object IDs (service principals, managed identities, users) that should be granted secrets get/list permissions."
      }
    },
    "secrets": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of secrets to create. Each item: { \"name\": \"secretName\", \"value\": \"secretValue\", \"contentType\": \"optional\" }."
      }
    },
    "tags": {
      "type": "object",
      "defaultValue": {}
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "secretPermissionsBroadRead": [
      "get",
      "list"
    ]
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": "[parameters('tags')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "name": "[toUpper(parameters('skuName'))]",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "enabledForDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]",
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": "[parameters('useRbacAuthorization')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[parameters('publicNetworkAccess')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "enablePurgeProtection": false,
        "accessPolicies": "[if(parameters('useRbacAuthorization'), json('[]'), array(map(parameters('objectIds'), createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', item(), 'permissions', createObject('keys', json('[]'), 'secrets', variables('secretPermissionsBroadRead'), 'certificates', json('[]'), 'storage', json('[]'))))))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('keyVaultName'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].name)]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "value": "[parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].value]",
        "contentType": "[if(contains(parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()], 'contentType'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].contentType, json('null'))]"
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "secretsCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('secrets'))]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2023-07-01').properties.vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
